tecnologia.titulo: Fika Jobs raises $4M to build a video-first hiring platform where AI agents interview candidates
tecnologia.resumen: Stockholm-based startup Fika Jobs is building a video-first hiring platform that combines AI interview agents with short-form video profiles, creating something that feels like a cross between LinkedIn and TikTok.
